_HOW_TO: EASIEST: don't edit this by hand — run  node import.js yourfile.csv  (or .vpax) to build my-estate.json straight from your real export. ALTERNATIVELY, fill it manually: Step 1 copy this file to 'my-estate.json' (that copy is gitignored, so your real numbers are NEVER pushed to GitHub). Step 2 replace the values below with YOUR real numbers (Capacity Metrics export, DAX Studio / Vertipaq Analyzer, or refresh history). Delete any section you don't have data for; keep the JSON structure. Step 3 run  node mytest.js
